Id1.text: The Antares rocket is launched from the Mid-Atlantic Regional Spaceport and its first voyage was on January 9th 2014.

Id2.text: The Antares rocket had its maiden flight on January 9th 2014 and was launched from the Mid-Atlantic Regional Spaceport.

Id3.text: The rocker Antares was launched on its maiden flight from the Mid-Atlantic Regional Spaceport on 9 January 2014.
